summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ELS MHD Step 06 - Ressourcen, Kommunikation & Konflikte. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all core functionality including Resources page with Statusmatrix and KPIs, Messages page with filters and Neue Meldung dialog, Konflikte page with auto-detection and color-coded cards, Quittieren functionality, inline status change on resources, and sidebar disabled state when no incident is active.

minor.issue: When creating a transport with ressource directly, the resource status is not updated to im_einsatz. Resource sync only happens on PATCH, not POST. This is by design per requirements but could be considered for enhancement.

seed_data_creation: Test incident TEST_Step06_Resources_Messages created and cleaned up by pytest. Demo incident MANV-Uebung Sued (712ca18e) used for frontend testing - has 1 critical message (now acked), 2 open transports (gelb konflikte).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 06 fully tested. Backend: Resources CRUD with lazy seeding (9 defaults: UHS Team 1-3, Radstreife 1, RTW 1-2, KTW 1-2, NEF 1), Messages CRUD with ack and open_only filter, Konflikte auto-detection (not persisted), Resource-Transport sync on PATCH, Cascade delete verified. Frontend: /ressourcen page with data-testid: resources-title, resource-matrix, kpi-res-total/verf/einsatz/wartung/offline, resource-row-*, resource-status-*. /kommunikation page with data-testid: messages-title, kpi-msg-total/offen/kritisch/dringend, mfilter-alle/offen/kritisch, messages-new, new-message-dialog, nm-prio/kat/von/text/submit/cancel, message-ack-*, message-delete-*. /konflikte page with data-testid: konflikte-title, konflikt-card-* with data-schwere=rot/gelb/info, konflikt-open-*, konflikt-resolve-*. Sidebar nav-ressourcen/kommunikation/konflikte disabled when no incident active. Command palette has G R / G K / G X shortcuts.

backend: GET /api/meta returns version 0.6.0 and step '06 – Ressourcen, Kommunikation & Konflikte'
GET /api/incidents/{id}/resources second call does not duplicate seed
PATCH transport with ressource='RTW 1' sets Resource.status=im_einsatz
PATCH transport with status=abgeschlossen frees Resource (status=verfuegbar)
Transport offen ohne Ressource >10min -> schwere=gelb (logic verified)
DELETE incident removes resources and messages (cascade delete)
frontend: /ressourcen: 9 resource rows with inline status select
/ressourcen: Inline status change updates KPIs and matrix
/kommunikation: New Message Dialog (new-message-dialog) with all fields
Sidebar: Ressourcen/Kommunikation/Konflikte disabled when no incident active
Sidebar: Ressourcen/Kommunikation/Konflikte enabled when incident active
Command Palette: G R / G K / G X shortcuts present
